Completed the assigned route iteration under Journaling Protocol (route_48f9d6bd5350) at depth 5. Generated 4 parameter package siblings:
1. **Prompt Parameter Package** (KEPT, rank 1, 8.70) — prompt categories, rotation, evolution, fallbacks for low-energy days
2. **Format & Delivery Parameter Package** (KEPT, rank 2, 7.25) — medium, timing, template, privacy (temporary survivor)
3. **Obsolescence & Transition Parameter Package** (KILLED, rank 3, 6.75) — obsolescence parameters foldable into Prompt Package
4. **Tracking & Metrics Parameter Package** (KILLED, rank 4, 6.27) — metrics embeddable; content analysis opt-in uncertain
